nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Ochre-naped ground tyrant
nodes.summary: Ochre-naped ground tyrant（Ochre-naped ground tyrant，学名 Muscisaxicola flavinucha），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

In elevation it mostly ranges between but breeds as low as in northern Chile and sometimes gets to near sea level there. It ranges between in Peru
